text:
### Winter Activities & Experiences
- Bled Christmas Market: December–January, featuring local crafts, mulled wine, traditional Slovenian food, and live music
- Skiing at Krvavec: 30 min drive, 23 slopes, ski passes available through the hotel
- Ice skating: Seasonal outdoor rink in Bled (December–February), weather permitting
- Sledding: Straža hill offers sledding in winter (sleds available for rent)
- Cross-country skiing: Multiple trails in the Bled area, equipment rental available
- Thermal spas: Rimske Terme (20 min drive) and Terme Bled (10 min drive) for winter wellness
- Winter hiking: Snowshoeing and winter trails around Lake Bled and Vintgar Gorge
- New Year's Eve: Special dinner at Restaurant Adora with live music and champagne
- Valentine's Day: Romantic packages available with couples massage, private dinner, and rose petal turndown

### Gift Vouchers
- Gift vouchers available for any amount (minimum €100)
- Valid for 12 months from date of purchase
- Can be used for any suite, package, or dining experience
- Digital delivery via email or physical card mailed to recipient
- Popular amounts: €250 (dinner + spa), €500 (one night stay), €1,000 (weekend package)
- Corporate gift vouchers available with custom branding
- Purchase via the website (Gift Voucher page) or by contacting reception
- Vouchers are refundable within 14 days of purchase if unused

### Sustainability & Eco Initiatives
- Villa Adora is committed to sustainable tourism and environmental responsibility
- Solar panels installed on the roof provide 30% of the hotel's electricity
- All cleaning products are eco-certified and biodegradable
- Linens and towels are changed on request only (not daily) to reduce water usage
- The hotel sources 70% of restaurant ingredients from local Slovenian producers (within 50 km)
- Electric vehicle charging stations available free for guests (2 Type 2 connectors)
- The hotel garden uses organic pest control and composting
- Single-use plastics have been eliminated — all amenities are in refillable dispensers
- Guests receive a digital guidebook instead of printed materials
- Carbon offset program available for guests who wish to offset their travel emissions

### Slovenian Wine & Culinary Experiences
- Wine tasting: Weekly wine tasting events featuring wines from 4 Slovenian wine regions (Podravje, Posavje, Primorska, Štajerska)
- Cooking class: Learn to make traditional Slovenian dishes (štruklji, žlikrofi, potica) with Chef Domen Demšar — €85 per person
- Restaurant Adora: Creative Slovenian-French cuisine, Tuesday–Sunday, lunch and dinner
- Brunch: Thursday–Saturday, featuring local products and fresh pastries
- Private dining: Available on the terrace or in the wine cellar for special occasions
- Recommended wines: Šipon (Furmint) for dry white, Pinela for aromatic white, Teran for bold red, Cviček for light red
- The hotel offers a curated wine list of 40+ Slovenian wines
- Wine pairing dinner available on request (4 courses with matched wines — €95 per person)

### Local Experiences & Day Trips
- Bled Island: Traditional pletna boat to the island, Church of the Assumption, wishing bell
- Bled Castle: Medieval castle with museum, wine cellar, and panoramic views (30 min walk)
- Vintgar Gorge: Stunning 1.6 km gorge with wooden walkways (4 km from Bled)
- Lake Bohinj: Slovenia's largest permanent lake, 30 min drive, swimming and hiking
- Ljubljana: Capital city, 45 min drive, dragon castle, old town, riverside cafes
- Postojna Cave: Famous karst cave with unique underground train (1 hour drive)
- Piran: Venetian coastal town on the Adriatic (1.5 hours drive)
- Triglav National Park: Slovenia's only national park, hiking, climbing, and alpine scenery
- Planica: World-famous ski jumping venue, Nordic center (20 min drive)
- The concierge can arrange guided tours, transportation, and skip-the-line tickets for all attractions
